bootstrap.candidate_stream_resample: 24 draws with replacement from the paired 3-seed by 8-member order; one index vector shared by P1 and P2
bootstrap.comparator_stream_resample: 8 draws with replacement; one index vector shared by faithful and stochastic_prism_localized_par_v1
bootstrap.observation_resample: 30 calendar-year blocks with replacement independently by site; inter-block transition pairs and cross-boundary spells excluded

point_estimate.arm_metric: arithmetic mean of each registered metric over all arm streams at one site
point_estimate.reference: lower site composite error of faithful and stochastic_prism_localized_par_v1
point_estimate.regime_composite: unweighted arithmetic mean of all finite registered common-component scaled errors

prism_intensity.diagnostic: annual q95 of daily peak_rate_mm_per_hour where peak_rate = peak_intensity_ratio * precipitation_mm / duration_h and zero when duration_h is zero

temporal_decision.capacity_noninferiority: 90th percentile of bootstrap median regime ratio <= 1.25 and point maximum regime ratio <= 1.5
temporal_decision.p2_preference: bootstrap probability that mean paired regime error reduction (P1-P2)/P1 >= 0.10 is at least 0.90
